lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਮੇਰਾ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਹਮ ਤੇਰੈ ਦੁਆਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: too meraa tthaakur ham terai duaare |1|
lines.english: You are my Lord and Master; I wait at Your Door. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਮੇਰਾ ਤਰੰਗੁ ਹਮ ਮੀਨ ਤੁਮਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: too meraa tarang ham meen tumaare |
lines.english: You are my waves, and I am Your fish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਗਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਗੁਨੀ ਗਹੇਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saran gahee prabh gunee gaheraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have taken to Your Sanctuary, O God, most profound and excellent. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰਾ ਕਰਤਾ ਹਉ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਤੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: toon meraa karataa hau sevak teraa |
lines.english: You are my Creator, and I am Your servant.
You are my life, You are my Support.
Beholding You, my heart-lotus blossoms forth. ||2||
You are All-powerful, You are my strength. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਮੇਰੀ ਗਤਿ ਪਤਿ ਤੂ ਪਰਵਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: too meree gat pat too paravaan |
lines.english: You are my salvation and honor; You make me acceptable.
This is Nanak's prayer to God. ||4||23||74||
Night and day, I chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the treasure of excellence.
The mourner practices falsehood;
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋ ਮੂਆ ਕਾ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਗਾਵਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: ko mooaa kaa kai ghar gaavan |
lines.english: Someone has died, while there is singing in someone else's house.
he laughs with glee, while mourning for others. ||1||
the mortal does not attain his goals, and he comes to regret in the end. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋ ਰੋਵੈ ਕੋ ਹਸਿ ਹਸਿ ਪਾਵਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ko rovai ko has has paavan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One mourns and bewails, while another laughs with glee. ||1||Pause||
From childhood to old age,
Says Nanak, one who is attached to the Naam, the Name of the Lord,
The world is under the influence of the three qualities.
The mortal is reincarnated, again and again, into heaven and hell. ||3||
becomes acceptable, and his life becomes fruitful. ||4||24||75||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਇ ਰਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਖਬਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: soe rahee prabh khabar na jaanee |
lines.english: She remains asleep, and does not know the news of God.
The day dawns, and then, she regrets. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਿਲਬੇ ਕੀ ਲਾਲਸਾ ਤਾ ਤੇ ਆਲਸੁ ਕਹਾ ਕਰਉ ਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: prabh milabe kee laalasaa taa te aalas kahaa krau ree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You yearn to meet with God, so why do you delay? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਨਿ ਅਨਦੁ ਧਰਉ ਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: pria prem sehaj man anad dhrau ree |
lines.english: Loving the Beloved, the mind is filled with celestial bliss.
He came and poured His Ambrosial Nectar into your hands,
it is not the fault of God the Creator. ||3||
You are burdened with desire, emotional attachment and egotism;
but it slipped through your fingers, and fell onto the ground. ||2||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
O Nanak, the Creator Lord blends us with Himself. ||4||25||76||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the darkness of doubt is dispelled.
The wretched Messenger of Death has run away from me. ||1||
I long for the Lotus Feet of my Beloved Lord.
You enter into my mind, by Your Kind Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਤ ਨਾਮ ਸਗਲ ਰੋਗ ਖਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: simarat naam sagal rog kheaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, all diseases are destroyed. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹੁਚਿ ਨ ਸਾਕਹਿ ਜਨ ਤੇਰੇ ਕਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: pahuch na saakeh jan tere kau |2|
lines.english: but it cannot even come near Your slave. ||2||
Death gives so much pain to others,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸ ਤੇਰੇ ਕੀ ਪਿਆਸ ਮਨਿ ਲਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: daras tere kee piaas man laagee |
lines.english: My mind thirsts for Your Vision;
Hear this prayer of Nanak:
in peaceful ease and bliss, I dwell in detachment. ||3||
My mind is satisfied, and my entanglements have been dissolved.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
please, infuse Your Name into his heart. ||4||26||77||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੈ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਸੋ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਨਿਰਭੈ ਧਨੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai grihi sabh kichh hai pooran so bhettiaa nirabhai dhanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: His House is overflowing with all things; I have met Him, the Fearless Master. ||1||Pause||
By the Grace of the Saints, everything has turned out well.
God has become merciful to me. ||1||
By the Kind Mercy of the Holy Saints, the Naam has been implanted within me.
The most dreadful desires have been eliminated. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਟਿ ਗਈ ਭਾਲ ਮਨੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: mitt gee bhaal man sehaj samaanaa |
lines.english: My search has ended, and my mind is absorbed in celestial bliss.
the fire has been extinguished, and my mind is now at peace. ||3||
My Master has given me a gift;
